name: Shopping List
description: Making sure you have enough Mana Orbs.

sorting-order.name: Sorting Order
sorting-order.description:
In what order do you want the items from the mod to be sorted.
***
* <cy>Mod Default</c>: How originally the mod works, sorts the items by their game-modes, followed by their IDs.
* <co>Shop Order</c>: There's no order, is shown how they look inside the shops.
* <cg>Price:</c> Sorts the items by their price first, followed by their game-modes and then IDs.

garage-button.name: Icon Kit Button
garage-button.description: Whenever you want the button of the mod inside the <cy>Icon Kit</c>.

shops-button.name: Inside Shops Button
shops-button.description: Whenever you want the button of the mod at the bottom left corner of any of the <cy>Shops</c>.

paths-page.name: Page for Paths
paths-page.description:
Adds an extra page that goes for the <cy>Paths of Power</c>.
***
<cc>Technically, the Paths of Power aren't part of any shop, but they can be bought as an item so it's added here</c>.
